# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Please report security issues via email to:

**bridgeace@tutamail.com**

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fix (optional)

We follow responsible disclosure. We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and aim to release a fix within 14 days for confirmed issues.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release receives security fixes.
